subject: A final live artifact produced by @designer -- an HTML report, a chart-set placement, or a data export -- after the underlying draft has already cleared @auditor's compliance gate.

dimensions.desc: The artifact is well-formed in its declared format (valid HTML/CSV/JSON) with no placeholder text (TODO, TBD, [insert chart]) left in.
A non-expert reader can follow the artifact top to bottom without translation -- short paragraphs, clear structure, no unexplained jargon.

Every chart is captioned and traceable to real data, every cited number traces to a source, and nothing the auditor already cleared (a number, a risk disclosure, a compliance claim) was altered in the edit pass.

guidance: Reward a finished artifact that renders/parses cleanly, reads naturally for a non-expert client, and shows evidence of a careful final pass (captions, no orphaned numbers, no re-litigated findings). Penalize broken markup, leftover placeholder text, jargon-heavy prose a client would need translated, an uncaptioned or untraceable chart, and any sign the editor changed a number or risk disclosure that was not theirs to touch.
